text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin isn't feeling well, so I take her to the
infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you're such a worrier. But fine. I won't
budge from this bed until I'm all rested up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Commander
text_block_list.text:
Agent Ines has successfully infiltrated the
compound. Sounds like her mic's functioning just
fine too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wuh, what?! "Infiltrated?" What's this all about?

text_block_list.name: Commander
text_block_list.text:
Quiet. You were the one who applied to be a
part-time spy, remember?

text_block_list.name: Commander
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. Make your way to the top floor and
retrieve the evidence while remaining undetected.
The fate of the world rests in your hands!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay! Hmm... I think I remember applying for
this role a while back?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I signed up for this, so I'd better do a good
job!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
By "evidence," did they mean this pearl? I mean,
it's literally tagged, "The Evidence."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to stash this and make my escape—

text_block_list.name: Evil Inc. Security Guard A
text_block_list.text:
Who goes there?!
Intruder spotted on the seventh floor! Send
backup!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! This is bad! I'd better get out of here fast!

text_block_list.name: Evil Inc. Security Guard B
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Tch! This one sure knows how to duck and dive!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but when it comes to making an escape,
there's no way I'm losing!

text_block_list.name: Commander
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Agent Ines! The world is safe now,
thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yay! I saved... the Earth... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, geez. It was all a dream! It's probably
'cause of that cartoon I watched with my sisters.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I slept well, and I kept the world safe from harm
too. Everything worked out nicely. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh no! They've got me surrounded! This means...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I've failed my task!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin remains worn out after her nightmare.
